phrases.intent_en: Where do I rent the audio guide
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically handled at the main ticket counter.

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket desk, right by the entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket desk, right by the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Is photography allowed in Royal residence halls
phrases.text_local: Můžu fotit v královských rezidenčních sálech?
phrases.cultural_note: Flash photography is commonly restricted in historic interiors to protect artifacts.

phrases.intent_en: When does the next guided tour start
phrases.text_local: Kdy začíná další prohlídka s průvodcem?
phrases.cultural_note: Tours often start on the hour or half-hour; staff give the exact next time.

likely_response.local: Za deset minut, ve dvě hodiny.
likely_response.translation_en: In ten minutes, at two o'clock.

responses.english: In ten minutes, at two o'clock.
responses.local: Za deset minut, ve dvě hodiny.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Preghaus minting chamber
phrases.cultural_note: The Preghaus is the historic mint; staff use short directional cues.

likely_response.translation_en: Through the passage to the left, past the fountain.

responses.english: Through the passage to the left, past the fountain.
